{"script":"const MonoGun = require('./monogun');\nconst fs = require('fs');\nconst path = require('path');\n\nconst dir = './test/verify-' + Date.now();\nfs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });\n\nconst db = new MonoGun({ file: path.join(dir, 'log.ndjson'), peers: [] });\n\n(async () => {\n  await db.ready();\n\n  const p1 = db.insert({ title: 'A', likes: 10 });\n  const p2 = db.insert({ title: 'B', likes: 20 });\n  const p3 = db.insert({ title: 'C', likes: 30 });\n\n  const result = db.select({\n    souls: [p1, p2, p3],\n    select: ['title', 'likes'],\n    filter: { likes: { $gte: 20, $lte: 30 } }\n  });\n  console.log('Filter $gte/$lte:', result.length === 2);\n\n  const all = db.select({\n    souls: [p1, p2, p3],\n    select: ['title'],\n    filter: {}\n  });\n  console.log('Empty filter:', all.length === 3);\n\n  const filtered = db.select({\n    souls: [p1, p2, p3],\n    select: ['title'],\n    filter: { nonexistent: true }\n  });\n  console.log('Filter missing field:', filtered.length === 0);\n\n  fs.rmSync(dir, { recursive: true, force: true });\n  console.log('Corner cases verified');\n})().catch(e => { console.error('FAIL:', e); process.exit(1); });","timeoutMs":30000}
